home.heroSubheading: Aesthetic clinic backoffice that frees you from spreadsheets, paper schedules, and copy-paste line messages — so you focus on the work that matters.

problemSolution.heading: Built for clinics, not generic SaaS.
problems: Patient records live in Excel + LINE chats — no single source of truth.
Course tracking is manual: receipts, sticker tally, sometimes guesswork.
Multi-branch reporting takes hours every Monday.
PDPA compliance is a binder, not a workflow.
solutions: One patient record across appointments, courses, receipts, and consents.
Course balance tracked per session, with audit trail.
PDPA consent capture + audit log baked in — not bolted on.

items.title: Course tracking
items.body: Sell a 5-session course; track every redemption with audit trail. No more sticker books.

items.title: Multi-branch ready
items.body: Switch branches in one click; reports roll up automatically. No spreadsheets.

items.title: LINE-native
items.body: Recall messages drafted from real visit history. Copy → paste into LINE OA.

items.title: AI assist
items.body: Visit summaries + recall drafts in Thai or English. Always reviewed before send.

socialProof.body: Five pilot clinics signing on through Q3 2026. Real names + photos land here once we go live.

pricingTeaser.heading: Simple per-clinic plans
pricingTeaser.body: Three tiers, monthly billing, no lock-in. Pilot clinics get the first 30 days free.

items.a: Solo to mid-size aesthetic clinics in Thailand running 1–4 branches. Not for hospitals.
On Supabase (Singapore region) under PDPA terms. You can export everything as CSV anytime.
Pilot ships with copy-to-LINE drafts. LINE Official Account API direct-send lands in 2026 H2.

items.q: Is the AI safe for medical context?
items.a: All AI output is draft-only and must be reviewed by clinic staff before patient contact. We never send AI text directly.
Day-one onboarding is 30 minutes. We pair every pilot clinic with a Lesso operator for the first two weeks.
No annual contracts. Cancel anytime; CSV export is one click.

tiers.name: Clinic
tiers.description: Single-branch clinics with up to 5 staff.

items.a: Monthly invoice via bank transfer or PromptPay. Annual billing on request — same rate, prepaid.
Yes — pilot clinics get 30 days free on the Clinic tier. After 30 days you continue paying or cancel.
Anytime. Pro-rated on the next invoice.

items.q: What if I add a branch mid-month?
items.a: We pro-rate the new branch from the day you add it; existing branches keep their cycle.
30-day money-back inside the pilot window. After that we do not refund partial months but you can cancel anytime.

intro.heading: Built around the daily routine.
intro.sub: Five workflows your clinic does every day. Lesso makes them faster, safer, and more honest.

sections.heading: Sessions tracked, not guessed.
sections.body: Sell a course; the balance lives in Lesso. Every redemption is one tap, one audit-log line, one less argument with the front desk.

sections.heading: Switch branches in one click.
sections.body: All your branches share the same patient ID. Reports roll up automatically — no Monday-morning Excel ritual.

sections.heading: Recalls in the language your patients reply to.
sections.body: Lesso drafts the message from real visit history. You review, copy, paste into LINE OA. Direct-send via the LINE API ships in H2.

sections.heading: Drafts, not decisions.
sections.body: Visit summary + recall drafts in Thai or English. Every draft is review-first; we never auto-send.

sections.heading: Consent in the workflow, not a binder.
sections.body: Capture consent once, scoped per purpose, exportable per patient. Audit log is tamper-evident and never deletes.

intro.heading: Built by an operator. For operators.
intro.sub: Lesso is a small team that has run aesthetic clinics — not a generic SaaS shop pivoting in.

founder.name: Ratchasak
founder.bio: Ten years building software for healthcare and beauty businesses in Thailand. Lesso started after watching three clinics burn weekends on spreadsheets that shipped no value to patients.

about.mission: Less of the work that does not matter. More of the care that does.
about.verticalFocusHeading: We pick a vertical and go deep.

verticalFocus.title: Courses are the unit of value
verticalFocus.body: Aesthetic services sell as courses. Generic CRMs treat each visit as a one-off. We treat the course as first-class.

verticalFocus.title: Consent is non-negotiable
verticalFocus.body: PDPA + cross-border data rules apply differently to medical aesthetic. Our defaults assume the strict path.

verticalFocus.title: Thai-first, not Thai-localized
verticalFocus.body: Every screen reads in Thai before it reads in English. Recall drafts use Thai grammar a clinic patient actually replies to.

finalCta.heading: Get the first 30 days free.
finalCta.body: Five pilot slots through Q3 2026. We pair you with a Lesso operator for the first two weeks.

pilot.legalPrefix: By submitting you agree to our

sections.heading: Scope
sections.body: This policy describes how Lesso processes personal data submitted via the marketing site (lesso.clinic), the pilot signup form, and the pilot product. It applies to clinic owners, clinic staff, and patients whose data is entered into Lesso by clinic staff.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: Marketing site: name, clinic name, email, number of branches, phone, LINE ID, and any free-text message you send via the pilot form. Product (pilot only): patient records (name, phone, LINE ID, visit notes, consent timestamps), staff accounts, and audit logs of every change.

sections.heading: Purpose of processing
sections.body: Pilot signup: contacting you about the pilot, scheduling onboarding, and answering pre-sales questions. Product: providing the backoffice service, generating the audit log, and supporting PDPA subject-rights requests.

sections.heading: Sharing with third parties
sections.body: We do not sell or rent personal data. We share with sub-processors strictly needed to operate the service: cloud hosting (Vercel), database (Supabase, Singapore region), email delivery (Resend), and analytics (Plausible — cookieless, aggregate only).

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Pilot signup records: kept for 24 months from submission, then deleted. Product data: kept for the duration of the active subscription plus 90 days for billing reconciliation, then exported and deleted on request. Audit logs: kept for 7 years for medical-aesthetic record-keeping requirements.

sections.heading: Your rights under PDPA
sections.body: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, or objection at any time. Requests are honored within 30 days. We will verify your identity before acting on any request that affects another data subject.

sections.heading: Cross-border transfers
sections.body: Patient data is stored on Supabase in the Singapore region under PDPA cross-border transfer terms. Backups are encrypted and remain within ASEAN data centers. We do not transfer data to the EU, US, or other jurisdictions without explicit consent.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Email: privacy@lesso.clinic. We aim to respond within 5 working days. For complaints, the relevant authority is the Personal Data Protection Committee of Thailand (PDPC).

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accessing lesso.clinic or signing up for the Lesso pilot, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

sections.heading: Pilot definition
sections.body: The Lesso pilot is a 30-day free trial of the Clinic tier offered to up to five clinics in the Q3 2026 cohort. After 30 days you may continue on the Clinic tier (paid) or cancel at no cost. Pilot participants receive dedicated onboarding from a Lesso operator.

sections.heading: Use restrictions
sections.body: You may not: (a) use Lesso to process data of patients who have not given consent under PDPA; (b) reverse-engineer the service; (c) resell or sublicense access; (d) use Lesso for any purpose other than aesthetic clinic operations.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: You retain all rights to data you enter into Lesso. We retain all rights to the Lesso software, brand, and product design. Trademarks (Lesso name, logo) may not be used without written permission.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Lesso is provided as-is during the pilot. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages. AI-assisted output (visit summaries, recall drafts) is draft-only and must be reviewed by clinic staff before patient contact; we are not liable for patient outcomes resulting from unreviewed AI output.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.body: You may cancel at any time. We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these Terms with 7 days written notice, except in cases of legal compulsion or imminent harm, where we may suspend immediately. On termination, your data is exportable as CSV for 30 days, then deleted.

intro.heading: Notes from the operator.
intro.sub: Stories, decisions, and updates from the Lesso team. Light frequency — we ship, then we write.
